title: sorbus micrantha
intro: Sorbus micrantha, also known as the Chinese rowan or mountain ash, is a small deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sorbus micrantha include its ability to lower fever, reduce swelling, and boost the immune system, making it a popular treatment for respiratory infections and other illnesses. Herbal preparations of Sorbus micrantha can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, from colds and flu to digestive issues and skin problems.
